reviews.comment:
Un aparato de carga de aire no funciona por suerte tiene otro y al salida  de la estación donde hay que acelerar para ingresar a camino del buen aire tiene enorme pozo, de terror

(Translated by Google)
One of the air-charging machines isn't working, luckily there's another one, and at the exit of the station where you have to accelerate to enter Camino del Buen Aire there's a huge pothole, terrifying.

reviews.comment:
Lo bueno es el precio del combustible. YPF es el más barato siempre. La estación es pequeña. Atención amable. Lo unico malo es el retorno para volver a la autopista está en muy mal estado. Hay que esquivar los pozos.

(Translated by Google)
The good thing is the fuel price. YPF is always the cheapest. The station is small. The service is friendly. The only downside is the return trip to get back to the highway is in very poor condition. You have to avoid the potholes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNza2ZIM1ZnEAE
